siteAddress: Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford
proposal: Demolition Of Storage Buildings, Construction Of 6 New Dwellings, Conversion And Extension Of 2 Curtilage Listed Buildings, To Create A Total Of 8 Dwellings Along With Landscaping, Parking, Biodiversity Enhancement Measures And Other Associated Infrastruc
outreachAngle: We wrote up your approved scheme at Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford and modelled high-level senior debt at 70% LTGDV (£2.2m against estimated GDV £3.2m).
emailSubject: Indicative 70% LTGDV funding view for Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford
emailBody:
Hi Mr And Mrs Hearn,

I saw that Chelmsford City Council approved 26/00122/FUL for Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford. We have written a short market note on the site here: https://constructioncapital.co.uk/news/2026-04-22-26-00122-ful-chelmsford-planning-approved

Using local sold-price data, we estimate GDV at £3.2m. At 70% LTGDV, that points to high-level senior debt of around £2.2m, subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience and lender underwriting.

If this is a live scheme, I can put proper indicative terms together from our lender panel within 24 hours.

Regards,
Matt Lenzie
Construction Capital
